tips: Use async/await for I/O-bound operations to avoid blocking the event loop
Batch file reads and writes instead of one at a time for better throughput
Use Promise.all for independent concurrent operations
Cache expensive computations and API responses when possible
Use streaming for large files instead of loading them entirely into memory
Profile before optimizing — use console.time or Bun's built-in profiler
Minimize dependencies to reduce bundle size and startup time
Use lazy imports to defer loading of modules until they are needed
Avoid deep object cloning with JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)) for large objects
Use Map and Set instead of plain objects for frequent lookups and insertions
Prefer for...of loops over forEach for better performance in hot paths
Use TypedArrays for working with binary data efficiently
